name: OS Therapies Inc
business: OS Therapies Inc is a clinical stage biopharmaceutical company focused on developing treatments for Osteosarcoma and other solid tumors. Its lead candidate, OST-HER2, is a cancer immunotherapy that has completed a Phase IIb trial in recurrent, resected pulmonary metastatic Osteosarcoma. It also owns the OST-tADC platform for next-generation antibody-drug conjugates.
namedSuppliers: Trustees of the University of Pennsylvania

exposures.sentence: We are a clinical stage biopharmaceutical company focused on the identification, development and commercialization of treatments for Osteosarcoma (OS) and other solid tumors.
We also own rights to an OST-tADC platform, a next generation ADC silicone dioxide linker technology.

catalysts.event: Submit clinical BLA module to FDA after Type B meeting
catalysts.sentence: We anticipate submitting the clinical BLA module following an expected Type B meeting with the FDA in the second quarter of 2026

catalysts.event: Complete conditional MAA submissions to MHRA and EMA
catalysts.sentence: completing conditional MAA submissions to both the MHRA and the EMA in the second quarter of 2026
We also anticipate releasing additional biomarker data in the second quarter of 2026
We expect to initiate confirmatory clinical studies in the third quarter of 2026

tamClaims.claim: Incident rate of Osteosarcoma approximately 1,000 individuals per year in the US
tamClaims.sentence: This challenge is particularly significant because we are focused on patients with rare Osteosarcoma, which has a relatively low prevalence, with an incident rate of approximately 1,000 individuals affected per year in the United States.
